perspectives.title: Mīmāṃsā under the symbolism-shift reading
perspectives.subtitle: An interpretive reading: what the corpus's contemporary-reader-encounter framing implies about Pūrva-Mīmāṃsā as a coherent practice-philosophy whose externalised form is intact while the symbol-environment that activated it has changed. The school's own self-understanding is preserved in the timeline thinker entries; this layer is explicitly extramural to that self-understanding.
